Disney Planes (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $90,282,580Details
International Box Office $147,776,989
Worldwide Box Office $238,059,569
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $61,663,658
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $29,768,879
Total $91,432,537
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A 3D animated comedy featuring Dusty, a plane with dreams of competing as a high-flying air racer. But Dusty’s not exactly built for racing—and he happens to be afraid of heights. So he turns to a seasoned naval aviator who helps Dusty qualify to take on the defending champ of the race circuit. Dusty’s courage is put to the ultimate test as he aims to reach heights he never dreamed possible, giving a spellbound world the inspiration to soar.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$22,232,291 (24.6% of total gross)
Legs:4.06 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:37.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,702 opening theaters/3,716 max. theaters, 7.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $132,814,221

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 9th, 2013 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: August 14th, 2013 (Wide) (Spain)
August 15th, 2013 (Wide) (Portugal)
August 16th, 2013 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
August 22nd, 2013 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
August 30th, 2013 (Wide) (Iceland)
Video Release: November 19th, 2013 by Buena Vista Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some mild action and rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2280, 7/10/2013)
Running Time: 91 minutes
Franchise: Planes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animated Inanimate Objects, Fantasy Sequence, Scene in End Credits, Split Screen, Training Montage, Voiceover/Narration
Film format: 3-D
Plot point: Anxiety and Phobias, Miscellaneous Racing, Underdog
Social setting: In a Plane
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DisneyToon Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

A 3D animated comedy featuring Dusty, a plane with dreams of competing as a high-flying air racer. But Dusty’s not exactly built for racing—and he happens to be afraid of heights. So he turns to a seasoned naval aviator who helps Dusty qualify to take on the defending champ of the race circuit. Dusty’s courage is put to the ultimate test as he aims to reach heights he never dreamed possible, giving a spellbound world the inspiration to soar.
